task_completion.description: Verify the basic rule information including name, customer group, and coupon type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Rule Information' section in the Magento Admin panel. 'Rule Name' should be 'BACK2SCHOOL25', 'Customer Groups' should have 'General' selected, and 'Coupon' should be set to 'Specific Coupon' with the 'Use Auto Generation' checkbox ticked.

task_completion.description: Verify the coupon usage limits and the expiration date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Rule Information' section, 'Uses per Coupon' should be set to 5, 'Uses per Customer' should be set to 1, and the 'To' date (expiry) should be set to 12/31/2025 (or 2025-12-31).

task_completion.description: Verify the rule condition requires a minimum subtotal of $75.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Conditions' tab. There should be a condition stating 'Subtotal equals or greater than 75' (or similar wording indicating a minimum subtotal of 75).

task_completion.description: Verify the discount amount, priority, and stop further processing settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Actions' tab. 'Apply' should be set to 'Percent of product price discount', 'Discount Amount' should be 25, 'Discard subsequent rules' (or Stop Further Rules Processing) should be set to 'Yes', and 'Priority' (often found in Rule Information or Actions) should be set to 1.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 10 auto-generated coupon codes with the correct prefix were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage Coupon Codes' section at the bottom of the page. 'Coupon Qty' should be 10, 'Code Prefix' should be 'B2S'. Look for a success message or a grid showing the generated codes starting with 'B2S'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento web interface to create the rule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely filled out the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent interacting with input fields, dropdowns, and clicking 'Save' or 'Generate' buttons.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use external scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running PHP scripts, cURL commands, or SQL clients to insert the rule data directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Magento cart price rule. Verified parameters: Rule Name: 'BACK2SCHOOL25', Customer Group: 'General', Discount: 25% ('by_percent'), Minimum Subtotal: 75.0, Priority: 1, Stop Further Rules Processing: Yes, Expiry Date: 12/31/2025. Coupons must be auto-generated with Prefix: 'B2S', Quantity: 10, Uses per Coupon: 5, Uses per Customer: 1.
